State University — Degree Audit
Program: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Catalog Year: 2024-2025
Total credits required: 120
Minimum cumulative GPA: 2.0

Core Requirements (all required):
  CS 101   Introduction to Computer Science   4 credits   (prerequisite: none)
  CS 201   Data Structures                    4 credits   (prerequisite: CS 101)
  MATH 151 Calculus I                         4 credits

Humanities Electives: 6 credits from HUM or PHIL courses numbered 100-499.

Completed:
  Fall 2024   CS 101    A    4 credits
  Fall 2024   MATH 151  B+   4 credits
In Progress:
  Fall 2025   CS 201         4 credits
